name: MTN-ELITE-ONE-PLATFORM
description: FootballOS monorepo workspace root. `frontend` and `backend1` are independent npm projects with their own dependencies/scripts; this root only orchestrates them for local dev/CI so a single `npm run build`/`npm run dev` at the repo root works.

scripts.dev: npm run start:dev --workspace=backend1 & npm run dev --workspace=frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=backend1
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=frontend && npm run lint --workspace=backend1
